/usr/bin/ar qc libdef.a CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiAlias.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiAssertion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiBlockage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiDebug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiFill.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiFPC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiGroup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiIOTiming.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiMisc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiNonDefault.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiPartition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiPath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiPinCap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiPinProp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiProp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiPropType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiRegion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiRowTrack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiScanchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiSite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiSlot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiTimingDisable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiUtil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defiVia.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/def_keywords.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defrCallbacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defrData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defrReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defrSettings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defwWriterCalls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/def/defwWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/def.dir/odb/src/def/generated/def_parser.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdef.a
